display.name: Release Manager
display.description: Plan, execute, and audit releases across your workspace.

commands.describe: Analyze changes and prepare release plan
commands.longDescription: Detect modified packages and compute version bumps based on changes
Run full release: plan versions, run checks, publish packages

commands.describe: Publish packages to npm registry with interactive OTP
commands.longDescription: Smart npm publish with interactive 2FA support and better UX

flags.name: otp
flags.description: One-time password (optional, will prompt if needed)

commands.longDescription: Restore workspace state from backup snapshot
Display the most recent release execution report
Parse git history and generate changelog with conventional commits support

flags.name: template
flags.description: Template name (builtin: corporate, corporate-ai, technical, compact) or custom path

flags.name: allow-major
flags.description: Allow major bumps for experimental packages

commands.describe: Preview release plan without making changes
commands.longDescription: Show release plan with bump table and changelog preview
Check if repo has substantial changes for release

flags.name: fail-if-empty
flags.description: Fail if no version bumps needed

artifacts.description: Serialized release plan generated by `kb release plan`.
Execution report emitted by `kb release run`.
Workspace changelog output produced during release.
